calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And General Mutual Release
Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kristina Lam for Robert Garcia, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Joseph Gruber for Maxwell C. Shapiro, Contestant (via Zoom).
Robert Garcia, present in the courtroom.

The court congratulated the parties on reaching a settlement. Both parties confirmed that the terms of the agreement include the withdrawal of the will contest upon approval of the settlement and the admission of the will to probate.

The Court took the Petition for Approval of the Settlement Agreement under submission with the intent to grant. The Court then inquired whether there were any objections to admitting the will. No objections were raised. The Court proceeded to admit the will to probate:

The will dated June 22, 2019, is admitted to probate. Robert Garcia is appointed executor with full IAEA authority. The letters of special administration for Robert Garcia shall expire today, February 25, 2025. No bond is required, as waived in the will. Shirley Yawitz shall remain as the probate referee. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for April 7, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If the executor files either petition at least two weeks before the hearing date, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Continued To Feb-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Continued To Feb-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Continued To Feb-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-16-2024 Continued To Jan-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Rowena Navia, Esq., for Robert Garcia, Petitioner.
Joseph Gruber, Esq., for Maxwell Shapiro, Contestant.

At the outset, Mr. Gruber reports that the matter has settled and requests a continuance to finalize the settlement. The court reminds Ms. Navia of her assurances to the court that she would file acknowledgement of receipt of the will contest. Ms. Navia acknowledges the court's reminder and reports that she will file the preceding forthwith.

The subject matter is continued to Jan-08-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. A Status of Settlement shall be set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Lopez. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-07-2024 Continued To Oct-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for Robert Garcia (proposed administrator).
Joseph Gruber appeared by zoom for Maxwell Shapiro (contestant).

Mrs. Navia stated that the will contest is still going forward, that at prior hearings discussion was held with respect to the special administrator gathering all of the decedent's assets, that they have been talking about settlement and how to move forward, and that they need time to determine how to proceed. The court reminded Mrs. Navia that at the last hearing it was noted that she was to file something to acknowledge service of the will contest. Mrs. Navia stated that she will file something. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to October 16, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Belen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-26-2024 Continued To Aug-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Gruber appeared by zoom for Maxwell Shapiro (contestant).
Kristina Lam appeared by zoom for Robert Garcia (special administrator).

Mr. Gruber requested a continuance to allow Mr. Garcia the opportunity to complete marshalling of the assets to get a global picture of what the estate is. Mr. Gruber also stated that he is hoping to be able to discuss resolution and perhaps move forward to a settlement agreement. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to August 7, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Navia is to file acknowledgement of service of the will contest.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Continued To Jun-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kristina Lam appeared by zoom for and with Robert Garcia (special administrator) by zoom.
Joseph Gruber appeared by zoom for Maxwell Shapiro.

Mr. Gruber suggested a 60-day continuance stating that he plans on proceeding with the will contest and that he will agree to have Mr. Garcia marshal assets as the special administrator to have a better understanding as to what the assets are so that they can have meaningful settlement discussion. Mrs. Lam agrees. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to June 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Guillory. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Continued To Apr-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for and with Robert Garcia (proposed executor) by zoom.
Joseph Gruber appeared by zoom for Maxwell Shapiro (contestant).

Ms. Navia stated that she will be filing a status update today, that her client is waiting to hear back from Charles Schwab. Mr. Gruber stated that medication is premature and that both parties want to discuss a possible settlement. The Court extends the letters of administration to next hearing date. The matter is continued to April 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. File status by April 03, 2024.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Continued To Dec-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for and with Robert Garcia (proposed executor) by zoom.
Joseph Gruber appeared by zoom for Maxwell Shapiro (contestant).

Ms. Navia stated that she needs a continuance to marshall the assets, that she needs a complete asset of decedent to move forward with the settlement. The Court stated that Mr. Garcia to remain special administrator. Petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary is continued to December 13, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Continued To Oct-04-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for and with Robert Garcia (proposed executor) by zoom.
Joseph Gruber appeared by zoom for Maxwell Shapiro (contestant).

Mr. Gruber stated that the will contest is proceeding. Mrs. Navia stated that they have discussed how to move forward and come to some arrangement between the estate and Mr. Shapiro, that her client does not know the status of the estate currently, that when the decedent passed away his agent was unable to continue to receive any statements and that her petition for special letters has been submitted electronically. The clerk confirmed that said petition is pending in the e-file queue. Mrs. Navia stated that she will inform Mr. Gruber of the hearing date as soon as she receives it. Mr. Gruber stated that his client has consented to the appointment of a special administrator. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to October 4, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-31-2023 Continued To Aug-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for Robert Garcia.
Joseph Gruber appeared by zoom for Maxwell Shapiro (contestant).

The court stated that it received Mrs. Navia's response yesterday, but it did not have a chance to review it. Mr. Gruber requested 120-days to allow the parties a chance to discuss informal resolution/the possibility of mediation and the ability to file a petition for approval of a settlement agreement if they are able to resolve the matter. Mrs. Navia stated that she has no objections. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to August 9, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the parties need more time, they are to file an ex parte request. Mrs. Navia raised the issue of the requirement of a summons in a will contest, stated that it is not her contest, and that she believes they can confer to see if they will move forward with trial, or find a compromise.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
